# [Free Workshop] Use A.I to Build Your Dream Site in Just 30 Sec 😯

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2024-12-10 16:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 369

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Do you wish you could have a custom website without the
challenges of coding or the restrictions of pre-built themes?

Imagine creating a professional, customized website in a fraction
of the time...

With artificial intelligence, it's now a reality!

We're excited to show you how it works in our FREE live workshop
with John Turner, Co-Founder of SeedProd, on Jan 8th at 10:30 am
EST.

Join for free: Build Your Dream WordPress Website in Just 30
Seconds with AI! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.NlvdnJ1vTPar2HBWdrLR-SLC_U38b5lMsvJfuY2K9rI )

Build your dream WordPress website with AI 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.NlvdnJ1vTPar2HBWdrLR-SLC_U38b5lMsvJfuY2K9rI )
In this workshop, you'll learn how to:

* Kickstart Your Design with AI: Use SeedProd’s AI Assistant to
generate a website layout effortlessly, saving you valuable time
and effort.
* Master AI Prompts for Content Creation: Discover the secrets of
crafting effective prompts to generate compelling website content
as you build.
* Customize and Refine Your Design (No Coding!): Learn how to
easily tweak and perfect your AI-generated design without needing
any coding skills.
* Unlock Advanced AI Features: Grow your global reach with
ChatGPT-assisted translations and create stunning original images
in seconds with DALL-E 2.

Building a stunning website has never been easier.

Ready to transform your online presence with the power of AI?

👉 Register for the FREE WPBeginner Workshop Today! 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._X19zPTBhNjJ4bzR6ZGdjZ3ViMDZydGpjIn0.NlvdnJ1vTPar2HBWdrLR-SLC_U38b5lMsvJfuY2K9rI ) (Jan 8th,
10:30 am EST)

See you there,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
